vector-skin-desc:
Tu Wektor noka a=kore:
* 2011 - MonoBook asir werson ne, asir noka kor wa eywanke pirka kuni hempak ka a=pirkare.
* 2022 - WMF [[mw:Desktop Improvements]] cikarkorampe or un a=kar Wektor ne.
prefs-vector-enable-vector-1-help: Tane wano pa hempak pakno, Wektor noka a=asire kor oka kusu ne. Husko Wektor ani, (2019 pa 12 cup pakno) husko Wektor werson a=nukar easkay. Asire pakno a=eraman kusu, [[mw:Reading/Web/Desktop_Improvements|cikarkorampe sos]] or un arpa yan.
vector-opt-out-tooltip: Husko noka (Husko Wektor) or un hosipi kusu, e=kor iyanu kiru.
vector.css: /* Tan CSS opitta, Wektor noka eywanke utar a=nure nankor */
vector.js: /* Tan JavaScript opitta, Wektor noka eywanke utar a=nure nankor */
vector-action-toggle-sidebar: Sam un menu nukar a=easkayre ya a=eaykapte ya
vector-language-button-aria-label: Oya itak ani an sos or un arpa. {{PLURAL:$1|itak $1}} ani an easkay.
vector-no-language-button-aria-label: Tan sos anak tan itak patek ani an. Oya itak ani ka sos a=o.
vector-language-redirect-to-top: Itak ukotep anak sos pa ta, sos rehe sam ta an.
vector-search-loader: A=hunara wa a=pa kuni p a=uk kor an
vector-toc-toggle-button-label: $1 pon ik nukar a=easkayre ya a=eaykapte ya
vector-toc-collapsible-button-label: Sapa opitta nukar a=easkayre ya a=eaykapte ya
vector-limited-width-toggle: Itaksay ipe itomotuyeru yoni ya somo yoni ya
vector-limited-width-toggle-on-popup: Noka itomotuyeru opitta a=nere. Itomotuyeru pon kuni hosipi kusu, tan botan a=síkik.
vector-limited-width-toggle-off-popup: Tan botan a=síkik wa, itomotuyeru pon ya opitta ya a=nere easkay.
vector-pin-element-label: Tan pe sam un menu oraye
vector-prefs-limited-width-help: Pirka no a=nukar easkay kuni, itomotuyeru pon kuni a=nere.
empty-language-selector-body: Tan sos ipe anak oya itak ani isam.
vector-page-tools-unpinned-popup: Aeywankep menu teta tupte wa an.
vector-main-menu-unpinned-popup: Poro menu teta tupte wa an.
vector-readability-survey-description: Wikipedia itaksay hunak iki wa e=nukar yakun pirka? Pokna un a=etaye p eywanke wa noka a=numke. [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Reading/Web/Accessibility for reading|Nukar easkay kuni cikarkorampe]] pakno a=eraman.
vector-readability-survey-optout: Hoski sos a=síkik wa, noka a=hoppa wa sinep sos ta e=ramu hawe a=asinke. [[#close-vector-survey|Tan aeywankep a=isamka]].
